title: Spicy Crunchy Norwegian Potato Hash
description: A midnight craving Norwegian dish, vegan-friendly with the perfect balance of spicy and crunchy. Serve with a side of vegan sour cream or yogurt for added creaminess.

ingredients.name: Diced potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose high starch potatoes for extra crunch

ingredients.name: Diced jalapeño
ingredients.amount: 1 jalapeño pepper, seeded and finely chopped

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes, red bell pepper, and yellow onion to the skillet. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes start to brown.
Add the minced garlic and chopped jalapeño to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the pitted green olives, dried marjoram, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Continue cooking for an additional 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the Spicy Crunchy Norwegian Potato Hash hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or chives if desired.
